name: one-tool
description: Stateful CLI environment for LLM agents — no sandbox required

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/*.test.js dist/test/commands/*.test.js
scripts.test:live: npm run build && LIVE_AGENT_TESTS=1 node --test dist/test/agent-live.integration.js
scripts.test:live:groq: npm run build && LIVE_AGENT_TESTS=1 AGENT_PROVIDER=groq node --test dist/test/agent-live.integration.js
scripts.test:live:openai: npm run build && LIVE_AGENT_TESTS=1 AGENT_PROVIDER=openai node --test dist/test/agent-live.integration.js
